decisions.reason: Across 2 completed supporting variants, the sole manifested candidate has an identical target title, the same full first-author string Judith C Maro, and the same year 2013. The PubMed primary record confirms PMID 23867812 and DOI 10.1097/ede.0b013e31829dde59; no competing candidate was manifested.
